BolívarCoronas Junior
cigars.notes: Between the 1980s and 1993, this cigar was sold in the UK as "Amado Selección G".

cigars.name: BolívarRoyal Coronas
cigars.notes: The is the same cigar as the Prince Charles. The two were sold simultaneously (with the Prince Charles in 50s and the Royal Coronas in 25s) for a few years, before the Prince Charles was discontinued.Between the 1980s and 1993, this cigar was sold in the UK as "Amado Selección E".

cigars.name: Libertador
cigars.notes: Box has a 1930s style papeleta (end paper label).

cigars.name: New Gold Medal
cigars.notes: Some boxes were available to purchase by attendees of the 2023 Habanos Festival.

cigars.name: BolívarBolívar Tubos No.3
cigars.notes: Although discontinued in 2019, these cigars remained in production at least as recently as 2022.

cigars.name: BolívarCoronas Extras
cigars.notes: Between the 1980s and 1993, this cigar was sold in the UK as "Amado Selección C".

cigars.name: Gold Medal
cigars.notes: Re-release of a standard production cigar that was discontinued in 1992. There was also another limited release of these cigars produced for Germany in 2004.The texture of the gold foil used on these cigars changed circa-2009.

cigars.name: BolívarChurchills
cigars.notes: Sold in the UK as "Supremas Churchill" from 1980s to 1993.

cigars.name: BolívarGold Medal
cigars.notes: Re-released as a special edition in 2004 and 2007. Also appears in the Siglo XXI Millennium Humidor.

cigars.name: BolívarPrince Charles
cigars.notes: The is the same cigar as the Royal Coronas (released circa-1969). The two were sold simultaneously (with the Prince Charles in 50s and the Royal Coronas in 25s) for a few years, before the Prince Charles was discontinued.

cigars.name: BolívarCoronas Grandes
cigars.notes: There are reports of handmade versions available as late as 1979.

cigars.name: BolívarEspeciales (2)
cigars.notes: Possibly a special release or a private commission.

cigars.name: BolívarGold MedalLa Casa del Habano ExclusivoLCDH Exclusive Release
BolívarTubos Selección
cigars.notes: Released for the Hunters & Frankau Bolivar Centenary Dinner held in London in November 2002.

cigars.name: BolívarCentenary Dinner Humidor
cigars.status: A worldwide release through LCDH stores
cigars.notes: Released to commemorate the 100th Anniversary of the Bolivar Brand.

cigars.name: Bolívar100 Aniversario LCDH Humidor
cigars.notes: A small batch of these cigars (a previously discontinued production size) commissioned by 5th Avenue (German distributor) and sold in German La Casa del Habano stores.

cigars.name: BolívarColosalesEdición Regional Alemania
cigars.notes: Initially released in 2006, then re-released in 2007. In 2013, the cigar entered semi-regular production as a La Casa del Habano exclusive release.

cigars.name: BolívarLibertadorEdición Regional Francia
cigars.status: The 2008 re-released was not available until 2009

cigars.name: Bolívar5ta AvenidaEdición Regional Alemania
cigars.notes: Pre-release cigars had standard type C bands.

cigars.name: BolívarFabulososEdición Regional Benelux
cigars.notes: Originally proposed to be named El Greco.

cigars.name: BolívarGrecoEdición Regional Grecia y Chipre
cigars.notes: The tenth release of the Habanos Collection series.The pre-release version has "Simon Bolívar" above "Habana - Cuba" on the box (see the centre image).

cigars.name: Bolívar681Edición Regional Bulgaria551
cigars.notes: Commemorates the 50th Anniversary of Formal Diplomatic Relationship between China and Cuba.

cigars.name: BolívarDistinguidosEdición Regional China
cigars.notes: Originally intended to be a standard 46 ring gaugeBritanicas.

cigars.name: BolívarSuper Coronas454
cigars.notes: Released mid-2015.

cigars.name: BolívarBosphorusEdición Regional Turquía
cigars.notes: Released early-2016.

cigars.name: BolívarTiempoEdición Regional Francia
cigars.notes: Released April 2018.

cigars.name: BolívarShort BolívarEdición Regional Andorra151
cigars.notes: Released April 2018.

cigars.name: BolívarLusiadasEdición Regional Portugal
cigars.notes: Along with the Ramón Allones Silver Jubilee, this cigar commemorates the 25th anniversary of The Pacific Cigar Co Pty Ltd.

cigars.name: Exquisitos
cigars.notes: In c2002 the Seoane vitola was reportedly changed to a 33 x 126 size.

cigars.name: Siglo VI
cigars.notes: First cigar with the D style band.

cigars.name: BHK 52
cigars.notes: Behike is the fourth line of cigars in the Cohiba brand.

cigars.name: Pirámides Extra
cigars.notes: This cigar forms part of the Classic range.

cigars.name: Novedosos
cigars.notes: This cigar was 'launched' at an event in Spain in 2019 and a small number of boxes may have been available to distributors at that time. There are unconfirmed reports of limited production being available to VIPs from 2021 onwards. The cigar did not appear in any retail quantity until mid-2023.

cigars.name: BHK 58
cigars.notes: NFC chip in the box and on the main bands of the cigars.

cigars.name: Coronas
cigars.notes: Reportedly discontinued because of a size overlap with the introduction of the Siglo Series.

cigars.name: NovedososHabanos Specialist and La Casa del Habano Exclusive553
cigars.notes: Diplomatic Gifts are given by the Head of State to other Heads of States.

cigars.name: Lanceros
cigars.notes: Produced and gifted to government officials and selected VIPs. Some particularly special gifts will have standard custom bands printed with the recipient's name.

cigars.name: Lanceros
cigars.notes: Approximately 200 singles were gifted during the dinner and the ten boxes of each were auctioned.

cigars.name: Dinner of the Century
cigars.notes: Released to commemorate the 30th Anniversary of the Cohiba brand. Includes a numbered certificate.

cigars.name: Robusto Especial30 Aniversario Humidor451
cigars.notes: Released to commemorate the 30th Anniversary of the Cohiba brand.

cigars.name: Siglo V30 Aniversario Jar
cigars.notes: Produced for the 1997 Cohiba 30th Anniversary celebration party in Havana. Includes a numbered certificate.

cigars.name: PirámidesReserva del MilenioMillennium
cigars.notes: A number of similarly banded Gran Corona, Robusto, and Siglo II cigars were gifted at the 2001 Habanos Festival dinner.

cigars.name: Pirámides451
cigars.notes: 10th Anniversary of the introduction of the Siglo range.

cigars.name: Reserva Selección
cigars.notes: Released (late) as part of the celebration of Cohiba's 35th Anniversary.

cigars.name: Sublimes
cigars.notes: Released to commemorate the 40th anniversary of the Cohiba brand.

cigars.name: Behike40 Aniversario Humidor
cigars.notes: The fifth Anniversary of the Limited Edition Series (a re-release of the 2001 Pirámides).

cigars.name: Pirámides
cigars.notes: 10th Anniversary of the first humidor produced by the Guayasamin Foundation.

cigars.name: Guayasamin II Humidor
cigars.notes: The eighth release of the Habanos Collection Series.

cigars.name: Sublimes Extra
cigars.notes: The cigars are made with selected 2003 tobacco leaf fromSan Juan y MartínezandSan Luisregions, and were rolled at theEl Laguitofactory.

cigars.name: Siglo VI 2003551
cigars.notes: This Limited Edition also commemorates the 45th anniversary of the Cohiba brand.The tobacco has been selected from the finest areas of the Vuelta Abajo region; that of San Juan y Martinez and San Luis.

cigars.name: Robustos Supremos
cigars.notes: Cigars arrive individually wrapped in cellophane, but this is just for shipping purposes.

cigars.name: Majestuoso 1966
cigars.notes: Released early 2018.

cigars.name: Selección 50 Aniversario
cigars.notes: When this cigar was first announced, the factory name was given asCañonazo Doble, however, by the time of release it had been changed toSublimes No.1. A second batch of these cigars (reportedly 200,000) was rolled and released in 2019. The tobacco used in this second batch was from the same harvest as the initial cigars.

cigars.name: Ideales
cigars.notes: The first release of these cigars were 10,000 numbered felt and leather wrapped luxury boxes of 5, with special Premier Edition bands. These boxes were exclusive to the territories where Phoenicia Trading A.A. is the exclusive distributor.

cigars.name: 55 Aniversario
cigars.notes: Celebrates the Chinese Zodiac year of the rabbit. The first Habano released with an NFC chip in the box to aid in authentication.

cigars.name: Siglo de OroSiglo de OroChinese Year Series551
Espléndidos 2017
cigars.notes: Exclusive to the Asian market. Celebrates the Chinese Zodiac Year of the Dragon. Humidors are manufactured by French cabinet maker Elie Bleu.

cigars.name: Distinguidos
cigars.notes: An earlier special release cigar.

cigars.name: Salomón
cigars.notes: An earlier special release cigar.

cigars.name: Diadema
cigars.notes: An earlier special release cigar.

cigars.name: Distinguidos
cigars.notes: Launched at the 1999 Havana Festival to celebrate the Millennium.

cigars.name: DistinguidosReserva del MilenioMillennium 451
cigars.notes: The reason for this release is unknown.

cigars.name: Salomón IISalomón II
cigars.notes: The first release of the Habanos Collection Series.

cigars.name: Salomónes
cigars.notes: Apparently a limited run produced for Diadema s.p.a.While the dress boxes are unnumbered, the individual slide lid boxes are numbered.

cigars.name: DiademaDiademas Selección Limitada Italy251
cigars.notes: The reason for this release is unknown. Salomón was previously named Soberbios in the Siglo XXI Humidor.

cigars.name: Piramides
cigars.notes: The 12th release in the Habanos Collection series. Released early 2014.

cigars.name: Bariay
cigars.notes: It is likely that significantly fewer than the announced 450 of these humidors were actually released (based on their observed rarity in collections).

cigars.name: Château Lafite (Rothschild)
cigars.notes: Renamed "Château Lafite Rothschild" in 1983

cigars.name: 80 Aniversario
cigars.notes: Issued to celebrate Zino's 80th birthday. Although the size is officially listed as a Gran Corona (47x235), actual dimensions are reportedly 48x220.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosCancilleres
cigars.notes: The release announcement for these cigars erroneously listed them as having a "Centrofinos" factory name with 52 ring size andcabeza con apéndice(pigtail) head finishing.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosColección PrivadaEdición Regional España
cigars.notes: Released April 2015. The is named for the Japanese samurai code, and celebrates the 400th anniversary of Hasekura Tsunenaga's visit to Cuba, who stopped there on his way to Europe as part of the Keichō Embassy, and is considered the first Japanese citizen to visit the island.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosBushidoEdición Regional Asia Pacifico
cigars.notes: Released late-2015.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosExcelenciaEdición Regional Cuba452
cigars.notes: Originally proposed for Canada. Released early-2016.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosNorteñosEdición Regional Canadá
cigars.notes: Released by Phoenicia Trading A.A., distributor for Africa and the Middle East.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosLíderesEdición Regional China
cigars.notes: Official sources indicate that the cigar is a Gordito factory size, however, the cigars in market have the tumbada style head of the Insólito vitola. It is not clear if the mistake is in the official reporting of the size, or if they were manufactured with tumbada heads in a factory error. Box has rounded sides.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosGrandesEdición Regional Alemania
cigars.notes: Named for Esuebio Leal, a Cuban historian and director of the restoration of Old Havana, who passed away mid-2020.

cigars.name: DiplomáticosProtocoloEdición Regional Rusia351
cigars.notes: Celebrates the 30th Anniversary of the Pacific Cigar Company.

cigars.name: Royal Series
cigars.notes: Launched in Cyprus in late-2023, with some boxes sold to guests. May not be generally available.

cigars.name: Coronas de Luxe
cigars.notes: Available as a Tubo No.1 (B25at) until the 1980s.

cigars.name: Petit Lonsdales
cigars.notes: Available as a Tubo No.2 (B25at) until the 1980s.

cigars.name: Royal SeriesLa Casa del Habano ExclusivoLCDH Exclusive Release
cigars.notes: Released (late) to commemorate the 120th Anniversary of this Brand.Both humidor types contain Churchill size cigars, not Pacos (49 x 180) as listed in some websites.

cigars.name: VikingosEdición Regional Báltico
cigars.notes: Original release information referred to these cigars as "Especiales". The packaging refers to them as "Torpedos".

cigars.name: Choix de L´EpoqueEdición Regional Reino Unido
cigars.notes: The original Elegantes was aPanetelas Largasvitola.

cigars.name: NL No.1Edición Regional Países Bajos
cigars.notes: Celebrates the 20th anniversary of the founding of the Pacific Cigar Company Ltd. A quantity of these cigars were erroneously released with Exclusivo Canada bands.

cigars.name: InfantesEdición Regional Cuba451
cigars.notes: Released late-2015.

cigars.name: ImpérioRéplica de Humidor Antiguo
cigars.notes: W.I.H. stands for "Walk In Humidor". This cigar commemorate the 20th anniversary of Lebanon’s duty-free shop in the Beirut-Rafic Hariri International Airport.

cigars.name: W.I.H. 20 YearsEdición Regional Líbano551
cigars.notes: This packaging for this cigar is unusual, being a semi boite nature box of 50 in four layers; three of 13 cigars and one of 11 with a double size spacer block. This style of packaging was supposedly discontinued in 1973 - hence the name of the cigar.

cigars.name: Petit CayoEdición Regional Andorra
cigars.notes: Released mid-2019

cigars.name: TaínosEdición Regional Formosa
cigars.notes: Emporium Cigars (the Habanos distributor to Brazil) repackaged the final batch of 3,000 sticks into 150 humidors of 20.

cigars.name: Grand MarshallEdición Regional Balkani451
cigars.notes: The second French Regional Edition for 2020.

cigars.name: Cosacos
cigars.notes: In 2008 and 2011, humidors of 50 cigars were available through 5th Avenue, Germany.

cigars.name: Delicias
cigars.notes: Until c2002 was machine-made in Standard Mano size.

cigars.name: Invictos
cigars.notes: This cigar had limited availability.

cigars.name: Aromas
cigars.notes: This cigar was fairly rare.

cigars.name: AmateurEdición Regional Francia
cigars.notes: The first cigar released exclusively in a market with plain packaging laws.

cigars.name: Connoisseur No.1
cigars.notes: A single batch of cigars in 10 count boxes was produced and sold in Havana during the 2014 Habanos Festival. These cigars had a Festival XIII band in addition to the standard B style band. Some boxes from the same batch were available worldwide after the festival, reportedly without the special bands. There is some confusion about the spelling of the name of this cigar. Since launch, it was spelled "Connoisseur," however since the introduction of the Connossieur A in 2013, some boxes labeled "Connossieur" No.1 have been reported. The special bands added in 2021 use the "Connossieur" spelling, as does the gold ribbon inside the box, however, the outside of the boxes continue to use the "Connoisseur" name as of 2022.

cigars.name: Coronas Major
cigars.notes: Until c2002 there were two cigars with this name in different sizes, a machine-madeEminentes-mano(44 x 132), and a handmade Marevas (42 x 129mm). In 2002 they were rationalised into the current size.

cigars.name: Epicures
cigars.notes: Until c2003 was machine-made.

cigars.name: Magnum 46
cigars.notes: In 2010 a ceramic jar of 30 cigars were produced locally for Western Europe.Although officially discontinued in 2012, 50 count boxes have been reported with dates as recently as May 2014.

cigars.name: Majestic
cigars.notes: Until c2002 was machine-made.

cigars.name: Regalias
cigars.notes: Until c2002 was machine-made. When presented in tins, this cigar is considered to be part of theLínea Retro, along with theRomeo y Julieta Club Kings,Partagás Capitols,Hoyo de Monterrey Souvenir de Luxe, andPunch Triunfos.

cigars.name: Sir Winston
cigars.notes: Some catalogues depict these cigars in dark brown varnished or black painted boxes into the late 1970s.

cigars.name: Magnum 50
cigars.notes: This cigar was an earlier Special Release.

cigars.name: Noellas
cigars.notes: The initial release announcement specified that these were limited to 5,000 pieces. It appears that this only referred to the first run of the cigars, as a second batch appeared in 2013, and new batches have arrived sporadically ever since. This is a recreation of a discontinued cigar that was sold in similar glass jars until the early 1980s.

cigars.name: Coronas Minor
cigars.notes: Until c2002 there were two cigars with this name in different sizes, a machine-madeCoronitas-mano(40x 116), and a handmade Franciscanos(40 x 116mm). In 2002 they were rationalised into the current size.

cigars.name: Super Coronas
cigars.notes: The non-cedar wrapped cigar was discontinued c1994 but reintroduced in late-2000.

cigars.name: Culebras
cigars.notes: This box of 25 consists of 8 sets of 3 cigars (twisted together) plus a single cigar.

cigars.name: Connossieur BHabanos Specialist and La Casa del Habano Exclusive
Très Tubos Selection
cigars.notes: Commemorates the 160th Anniversary of the H.Upmann brand. Initially, 160 humidors were produced, with number plates giving their number out of 160. Subsequently, another 100 humidors were produced with numbers out of 260. The second batch have La Casa del Habano bands in addition to the special aniversario bands.

cigars.name: 160 Aniversario Humidor
cigars.notes: Released as a standard production cigar in 2008.

cigars.name: Magnum 50
cigars.notes: The first release of the Replica Antique Humidor Series.

cigars.name: Tacos ImperialesRéplica de Humidor Antiguo
cigars.notes: The seventh release of the Habanos Collection Series.

cigars.name: Magnum Especial
cigars.notes: This is the second release of the Travel Humidor series.

cigars.name: Magnum 48455
cigars.notes: Available at the 14th Habano Festival.

cigars.name: Robustos
cigars.notes: Released late-2015.

cigars.name: Supremas No.2Réplica de Humidor Antiguo
cigars.notes: Released in late 2015.

cigars.name: Sir Winston 2011551
cigars.notes: Released early 2020.

cigars.name: Propios
cigars.notes: Although intended to be exclusive to duty free and travel retail stores, due to the widespread shutdown of the travel industry in 2020, these jars were generally available via regular channels.

cigars.name: Super Magnum
cigars.notes: Celebrates the Chinese zodiac year of the tiger.

cigars.name: Magnum 52Magnum 52Chinese Year Series
cigars.notes: First announced to distributors for 2022 but was postponed and not announced to the public until the 2024 programme.

cigars.name: Epicure No.1
cigars.notes: Display box of 15 cigars in 5 cardboard packs of 3 introduced circa 2003, then discontinued in 2011. It appears a batch was produced in 2022 for unknown reasons, although the packaging remains discontinued on official lists.

cigars.name: Palmas Extra
cigars.notes: Until c2002 this cigar was machine-made.

cigars.name: Epicure Especial
cigars.notes: Previously a special release.

cigars.name: Escogidos
cigars.notes: Released late-2019.

cigars.name: Souvenir de Luxe
cigars.notes: Part of theLínea Retro, along with theRomeo y Julieta Club Kings,Partagás Capitols,H. Upmann Regalias, andPunch Triunfos.

cigars.name: Particulares
cigars.notes: Particulares were subsequently released as Limited Editions in 2000 and 2001, as a trial batch in late 2002/2003.

cigars.name: Maravillas
cigars.notes: In late 1960s limited quantities commissioned by Alfred Dunhill, London.

cigars.name: EscogidosLa Casa del Habano ExclusivoLCDH Exclusive Release
Particulares251
cigars.notes: A re-release of the Particulares LE2000.

cigars.name: Particulares
cigars.notes: Reportedly a trial batch produced late 2002, which proved unpopular as a production size cigar, but were official released for sale.

cigars.name: ParticularesParticulares Trial
cigars.notes: The third release of the Habanos Collection series.Incorrectly described in the pre-release information as a 49 x 194 vitola.

cigars.name: Extravaganza451
cigars.notes: Some examples have the B style band, while others have the E style.

cigars.name: Epicure Especial
cigars.notes: Made with leaves from the Hoyo de Monterrey plantation.

cigars.name: Regalos351
cigars.notes: The fifth release of this series.

cigars.name: Short Hoyo Pirámides251
cigars.notes: The fifth release of the Replica Antique Humidor Series.

cigars.name: Maravillas451
cigars.notes: Released late-2015.

cigars.name: Double Corona 2013
cigars.notes: Celebrates the Chinese Zodiac Year of the Ox.

cigars.name: Juan LópezSelección EspecialLa Casa del Habano ExclusivoLCDH Exclusive Release
Juan LópezSelección SupremaEdición Regional Reino Unido
Juan LópezSelección No.4Edición Regional Asia Pacifico351
Juan LópezSelección No.3Edición Regional Benelux
cigars.notes: Jars were likely repacked from the slide-lid boxes.

cigars.name: Juan LópezSupremeEdición Regional Canadá
cigars.notes: This is the second 2013 regional edition for France. Regions are normally allowed only one release per-year, however France appears to be an exception to this rule as it has two distributors; Coprova, carrying most brands and Altadis, carrying only Quai d'Orsay and Jose L Piedra.

cigars.name: Juan LópezMinutosEdición Regional Francia
cigars.notes: Released early 2015.

cigars.name: Juan LópezDon JuanEdición Regional Benelux
cigars.notes: Released mid-2015.

cigars.name: Juan LópezChiado 1864Edición Regional Portugal
cigars.notes: Released early 2016.

cigars.name: Juan LópezSelección SuperbaEdición Regional Gran Bretaña
cigars.notes: Released by Coprova, one of the two distributors for France.

cigars.name: Juan LópezPunto 55Edición Regional Francia
cigars.notes: Release for the Southern Cone (Chile, Argentina and Uruguay).

cigars.name: Juan LópezGran PatagónEdición Regional Cono Sur
Juan LópezDragonesEdición Regional Belux
cigars.notes: Named in celebration of the 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar. The cigar was launched at events held simultaneously with the World Cup final on December 18th, 2022. It was not available to the general public until mid-2023.

cigars.name: Juan LópezHat-TrickEdición Regional Qatar551
cigars.notes: Celebrates the 400th anniversary of the birth of French playwright Molière, author of the playDom Juan ou le Festin de Pierre("Don Juan or The Feast of Stone").

cigars.name: Juan LópezCincuenta y CuatroEdición Regional España
Petit Coronas (2)

cigars.name: Selectos (2)
cigars.notes: Replaced the machine-made Selectos (1).

cigars.name: Selectos (1)
cigars.notes: Around c1970, these cigars were handmade.Replaced by the handmade Selectos (2).

cigars.name: Cristales
cigars.notes: The only post-1960 cigar available in a glass tube.

cigars.name: GrandiososEdición Regional Asia Pacifico

cigars.name: Gran CanoEdición Regional Gran Bretaña

cigars.name: Selectos No.3Edición Regional Reino Unido
cigars.notes: Released late-2024.

cigars.name: Glorias
cigars.notes: There is a discontinued cigar with this name in a different size. There was also a Regional Edition cigar with this name in a different size.

cigars.name: Turquinos
cigars.notes: A different size to the previous cigar named Turquinos, which was discontinued in the 1970s. The name refers to the Pico Turquino, the highest point in Cuba.

cigars.name: Inmensos
cigars.notes: The release announcement for these cigars indicated that only 5,000 boxes would be produced, however, it appears that subsequent batches were produced annually until a 2014.

cigars.name: InmensosLa Casa del Habano ExclusivoLCDH Exclusive Release455
Belux No.1Edición Regional Belux
cigars.notes: Released mid-2015.

cigars.name: ParaisoEdición Regional Caribe
cigars.notes: First announced as a release for Germany, this was eventually released for all countries for which 5th Avenue is the distributor (Germany, Austria and Poland).

cigars.name: Platinum EditionEdición Regional Países Bajos
cigars.notes: Released March 2019.

cigars.name: InvictosEdición Regional Italia552
cigars.notes: A small number of these cigars were released in 2018. These early cigars had the standard B band.

cigars.name: Británicas ExtraEdición Regional Gran Bretaña551
cigars.notes: Released mid-2018.

cigars.name: OrgullososEdición Regional Suiza452
cigars.notes: Released late-2019.

cigars.name: Via BalcanicaEdición Regional Bulgaria
cigars.notes: Commemorates the 2024 Summer Olympic Games in Paris. The bundle of cigars is wrapped in a unique red, white, and blue ribbon.

cigars.name: No.4
cigars.notes: A replica (c1970s) Aluminium Pack of 5 was proposed in late-2009 but never released.

cigars.name: Edmundo
cigars.notes: In 2010 a ceramic jar of 25 cigars were produced for W. Europe.

cigars.name: Eagle
cigars.notes: The Montecristo Open range was introduced early 2009 as a lighter flavoured blend, supposedly targeted at "sporty outdoor smokers".A new vitola size was created for this cigar. The range was originally intended to be named Sport, and this cigar was to be called Mónaco.

cigars.name: Junior
cigars.notes: In the proposed Sport range, this cigar was to be named Swing.

cigars.name: Master
cigars.notes: In the proposed Sport range, this cigar was also to be named Master.

cigars.name: Regata
cigars.notes: A new vitola size was created for this cigar. In the proposed Sport range, this cigar was to be named Albatros.

cigars.name: Dumas
cigars.notes: Part of the premium 1935 line, which commemorates the founding of the Montecristo brand.

cigars.name: Maltés
cigars.notes: Part of the premium 1935 line, which commemorates the founding of the Montecristo brand.

cigars.name: Leyenda
cigars.notes: Part of the premium 1935 line, which commemorates the founding of the Montecristo brand.

cigars.name: Slam
cigars.notes: Forms part of the Línea Open.

cigars.name: B
cigars.notes: While discontinued in the 1980s, these humidors were reportedly produced yearly in extremely limited numbers until at least the early 2000s.

cigars.name: HerederosHabanos Specialist and La Casa del Habano Exclusive451
cigars.notes: While a discontinued production cigar, these humidors are reportedly produced yearly in extremely limited numbers.

cigars.name: Selección Box
cigars.notes: Launched at the 1999 Havana Festival to celebrate the Millennium. Due to the rejection of some defective jars, only a partial release was made. Replacement jars were not available until 2002. The balance of the stored 1999 cigars were packed and released late 2002. They have a box code OSU Nov 2002.

cigars.name: Double Corona
cigars.notes: There was also a single humidor containing 156 Montecristo No.3 cigars, released in 2001 for Compay's 94th Anniversary.

cigars.name: Humidor
cigars.notes: The fifth release of the Habanos Collection Series, and the 70th Anniversary of the Montecristo Brand.

cigars.name: Montecristo D
cigars.notes: A re-release of the Robustos Limited Edition 2000.

cigars.name: Robusto
cigars.notes: The first release of the Duty Free and Travel Retail Series.

cigars.name: EdmundoTravel Humidor
cigars.notes: Released to commemorate the 100th anniversary of Compay Segundo's birth. Replica of the discontinued Montecristo B humidor.

cigars.name: Sublimes
cigars.notes: The fourth release of the Replica Antique Humidor Series.

cigars.name: Montecristo 520
cigars.notes: Released early 2015.

cigars.name: Churchills
cigars.notes: Released mid-2016.

cigars.name: Double EdmundoTravel Humidor
cigars.notes: Released early 2020.

cigars.name: Supremos
cigars.notes: Exclusively available in the Spanish market. Celebrates the 250th anniversary of the Royal Tobacco Factory in Seville. Humidor is manufactured in collaboration between S.T. Dupont and La Cartuja de Sevilla. The humidor cigars have a predominantly black version of the250 Aniversario Real Fábrica de Tabacos de Sevillafoot band. The boxed cigars wear a white version.

cigars.name: Carmen250 Aniversario Real Fábrica de Tabacos de Sevilla
Edmundo 2018
cigars.notes: Celebrates the 150th anniversary of the founding of French lighter and accessories manufacturer S. T. Dupont. A total of 600 humidors released, 200 each of three different designs named Le Crépuscule, La Nuit and L’Aurore. S.T. Dupont also released matching accessories in the same designs as each humidor (ashtray, lighters, cutter, cigar stand). The factory size Preciosos is the same dimensions as the Maduro No.3, but is considered a separate vitola apparently due to differences in construction.

cigars.name: L'EspritS. T. Dupont 150 Ans
cigars.notes: Celebrates the Chinese Zodiac Year of the Dragon.

cigars.name: Por LarrañagaMontecarlos (2)

cigars.name: Picadores No.1
cigars.notes: From launch, this cigar was named the Picadores on the boxes, and was also referred to as such in launch materials and press releases. The Habanos S.A. official catalogue, however, always called it the Picadores No.1, as did their barcode validation system. As of the 2023, the packaging has been redesigned, with the name on the boxes now appearing as Picadores No.1. The special band was inspired by a 1970s design.

cigars.name: Serie D'Oro No. 2451

cigars.name: PreferidosEdición Regional 5ta Avenida352
cigars.notes: Named for Sir David Tang, founder of Pacific Cigar Co, who passed away in 2017.

cigars.name: Coronas Claro
cigars.notes: Prior to 2017, the name stamped on the boxes of these cigars was Coronas, however, catalogues and official records refer to them as the Coronas Claro. Prior to 1995, they had the colour grade "Claro" stamped on their base, which distinguished them from the otherwise identically packaged Coronas Claro Claro. Since 2017 the cigar has been named Coronas Claro on the box.

cigars.name: Especial d'Orsay
cigars.notes: Celebrates the 50th Anniversary of the Quai d'Orsay brand. Luxury boîte nature boxes of 5 cigars were available for purchase by attendees of the XXIV Festival del Habano in 2024.

cigars.name: Gran Corona
cigars.notes: On name on the box is "Grand Coronas".

cigars.name: Coronas Claro Claro
cigars.notes: The name on the box is "Coronas", and has "Clarisimo" stamped on the box base.

cigars.name: Robusto EmbajadorEdición Regional Francia

cigars.name: Belicoso RoyalEdición Regional Francia

cigars.name: Secreto CubanoEdición Regional Francia
cigars.notes: Released by SEITA, one of two distributors for France.

cigars.name: CapitolioEdición Regional Francia551
cigars.notes: Was ready for release in 2019, but was held back for an additional period in the distributor warehouses due to unrest in Lebanon at that time. The cigars were produced in two batches, with the first numbered out of 1,200 and the second 2,400 (beginning at 1,201). Because of the delayed release, both were available in market at the same time.

cigars.name: BaalbeckEdición Regional Líbano
cigars.notes: Released early 2020.

cigars.name: Senadores
cigars.notes: Celebrates the 25th anniversary of the founding of Interbak AG, the Swiss distributor of Habanos. Comes with a very elaborate outer cardboard box.

cigars.name: AcuerdoEdición Regional Rusia

cigars.name: Petit Piramides
cigars.notes: Released early 2014.

cigars.name: Ramón AllonesAllones Specially Selected (2)
cigars.notes: Dealer catalogues indicate that this cigar replaced an earlier Allones Specially Selected (discontinued 1972), which was a slightly different size, however, boxes of Allones Specially Selected in the modern format dated as early as 1960 have been discovered.

cigars.name: Ramón AllonesGigantes (2)
cigars.notes: There is also a discontinued Gigantes (1).

The jars are elaborately decorated with an image of the paintingLandscape with Red Roofby Alexej Jawlensky. This release was the second in Russian distributor Top Cigars Corporation'sArt Nouveau Series(the first had been a batch of aged Vegas Robaina Classicos that were released in jars with a different artwork in 2020).

All humidors are accompanied by a matching ashtray and lighter. The 'Journey' humidors are signed by Mohamed Zeidan (Chairman of Phoenicia Trading) and Habanos s.a.

cigars.name: Club Kings
cigars.notes: The Club Kings were available in both handmade and machine-made versions from at least 1945. Both versions were discontinued in the 1980s.A return of the handmade Club Kings was announced in 2015, although they were not released until early 2020. This lengthy delay was most likely due to issues sourcing the packaging for this release.The 2015 version is part of theLínea Retro, along with thePartagás Capitols,H. Upmann Regalias,Hoyo de Monterrey Souvenir de LuxeandPunch Triunfos.

cigars.name: Grand ChurchillsGrand Churchills Humidor
cigars.notes: Packaged in a regular dress box, which itself is packaged in a high quality cardboard outer box.

cigars.name: Churchills
cigars.notes: This is the first in the Año Chino series of commemorative releases for the Chinese zodiac years, with this one celebrating the Year of the Rat. Previously, cigars had been released with Year of the Dog and Year of the Pig branding, however these were standard production cigars repackaged by the Spanish distributor, and not an official Habanos release. The cigar is named variously as "8 Maravillas" and "Maravillas 8" in different locations on the packaging, internal flyers, and in the official press releases. Some distributor lists refer to the release as "Año de la Rata", however this term does not appear on the finished product.

cigars.name: Double Coronas

cigars.name: Robustos T
cigars.notes: This release is a tribute to the 40th anniversary of the Trinidad brand, and the 10th anniversary of its international commercial launch.Premium style tube originally announced but never released.

cigars.name: VillaHabanos Specialist and La Casa del Habano Exclusive
cigars.notes: Used as diplomatic or VIP gifts. Never gifted by Castro. Boxes have no official markings or certification.Since 1997, standard production Fundadores are used as Diplomatic gifts.

cigars.name: Gran Panetela

cigars.name: Gran PanetelaDinner of the Century

cigars.name: FundadoresCajón of 75
cigars.status: The original humidors were only released in Hong Kong and the United Kingdom
cigars.notes: The Double Robustos were named Ensuenos in the Siglo XXI humidor.In 2003 a large undisclosed quantity of identical but unnumbered humidors were made to be sold at the 2003 Habano Festival.

cigars.name: Farm House Humidor
cigars.notes: The sixth release of the Habanos Collection Series.

cigars.name: Short Robustos T451
cigars.notes: Released to mark the 40th Anniversary of the Trinidad brand.

cigars.name: Topes
cigars.notes: Humidor made by Italian furniture company DeART.

cigars.name: Robustos ExtraRobusto Extra Travel Humidor551
cigars.notes: First announced to distributors for 2022 but was postponed and not announced to the public until the 2024 programme. 10,000 leather wrapped luxury boxes of 5 released in June 2024 with Premier Edition branding, exclusive to the UK. Standard packaging will follow sometime later. Both the boxes and the footband of each cigar contain an NFC authentication chip.

cigars.name: Cabildos
cigars.notes: These cigars were first announced to distributors for the Habanos Añejados programme in 2021, but later repurposed for the first release of the Vintage programme. The humidors for these cigars are manufactured by S. T. Dupont. The first 55 humidors have an exclusive design from French fashion designer Charaf Tajer, to celebrate the 55th anniversary of the Trinidad brand.

cigars.name: FundadoresVintage 10Vintage Series
cigars.notes: Celebrates the Chinese Zodiac Year of the Horse in 2026.

cigars.name: Prominente
cigars.notes: This cigar was never released for sale. Some 800 cigars were gifted at the Gala dinner of the 4th Habanos Festival. Habanos S.A. press releases referred to this cigar as a Vegas Robaina Prominente - it is not clear what (if any) difference there is between this and the standard Don Alejandro.

cigars.name: Prominente4th Habanos Festival
cigars.notes: Produced to celebrate the 83rd birthday of Alejandro Robaina.

cigars.name: 83 Birthday Humidor
cigars.notes: Commemorates the 5th Anniversary of the Vegas Robaina brand.

cigars.name: 5 Aniversario Humidor151
cigars.notes: Released for the 15th Anniversary of 5th Avenue,Germany. Commonly known as "Jubiläums".

cigars.name: Robaina5th Avenue 15th Anniversary Edition Germany
cigars.notes: Special commission for the opening of La Casa del Habano Hamburg. Four artworks were commissioned from Cuban artist Angel Ramirez, with 50 prints of each distributed between the 200 boxes. Ramirez also designed the special cigar bands and box labels.

cigars.name: MaestrosEdición Regional España
cigars.notes: This cigar was planned to be released under the La Gloria Cubana brand. Because of trade mark problems, the release was changed to Vegas Robaina. The already produced La Gloria Cubana boxes were re-branded by adding a Vegas Robaina metal name plate to the boxes. There are pre-release cigars bearing the La Gloria Cubana band in circulation.

cigars.name: Petit RobainaEdición Regional Canadá
cigars.notes: Originally proposed as a 2010 release and thought to be abandoned. Rescheduled for 2010 but not available until 2012.

cigars.name: Petit UnicosEdición Regional Suiza551
cigars.notes: Released early 2015.
